query_normalized: anyflow: any-step video diffusion model with on-policy flow map distillation computer science
rationale: This paper belongs in the literature review because it addresses the same core domain (diffusion model sampling acceleration) and mechanism (reducing function evaluations via extrapolation) as the user's question, satisfying criteria (a) and (b) by providing canonical prior work on optimizing diffusion sampling efficiency, even though it uses a different specific technique (epsilon extrapolation vs. flow map distillation).
